body.title: Fix dicksimnel channel tests: _claim_next_ticket removed in T-dicksimnel-worker-listener
body.result: 4 _claim_next_ticket tests removed; replaced by TestDickSimnelWorkerListenerChannelEvent with 2 dispatch channel event tests
body.intention: I intend that the 4 tests in test_dicksimnel_channel.py are updated or removed to reflect that _claim_next_ticket no longer exists on DickSimnelDevice.
body.description:
4 tests in tests/inference/test_dicksimnel_channel.py reference DickSimnelDevice._claim_next_ticket which was removed in T-dicksimnel-worker-listener (dispatch is now bus-push, not self-polling). Pre-existing (introduced by T-dicksimnel-worker-listener when _claim_next_ticket was deleted).

Failing tests: test_claim_posts_working, test_claim_working_includes_title, test_claim_channel_failure_still_returns_ticket, test_claim_no_ticket_no_channel_post.

**Affected files:** tests/inference/test_dicksimnel_channel.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN: remove or rewrite the 4 claim tests. Channel events are now posted by DickSimnelWorkerListener._handle_dispatch(), so equivalent coverage should move to TestDickSimnelWorkerListener. OUT: changing device.py or worker_listener.py.
**Completion criteria:** The 4 failing tests no longer fail. Channel event coverage for dispatch exists in TestDickSimnelWorkerListener.
